# Standing Rules

- Do not merge external pull requests directly; extract intent and implement maintainer-owned fixes.
- Do not post comments, close issues, label items, open public pull requests, or publish releases without explicit human approval.
- Treat CI failures, packaging validation, and Slack setup confusion as high-leverage maintenance work.
- Diagnose every failed CI run to root cause, add a regression guard when feasible, and rerun the affected pipeline to green instead of relying on retries.
